title: Bridging the Gap in Education: Edu Delight Tutors’ Innovative Approach to Learning - FinancialEDGE
description: The founder of Edu Delight Tutors, Mr. Segun Bolujo, shares his vision, mission, and strategies for transforming education in Nigeria. With over two decades of teaching experience, in this execlusive interview with Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Of Financial Edge, Bolujo discusses how Edu Delight Tutors is bridging the gaps in traditional teaching methods,
html: The founder of Edu Delight Tutors, Mr. Segun Bolujo, shares his vision, mission, and strategies for transforming education in Nigeria. With over two decades of teaching experience, in this execlusive interview with Odume  Festus, Editorial  / Project Director Of Financial Edge, Bolujo discusses how Edu Delight Tutors is bridging the gaps in traditional teaching methods, providing accessible and engaging educational materials, and empowering teachers, parents, and students.
